title: critesion brevisubulatum subsp. turkestanicum
intro: Critesion brevisubulatum subsp. turkestanicum, also known as Turkestan wheatgrass or Turkestan brome, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Critesion. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Turkestan wheatgrass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and supplements, and is often consumed fresh or dried to reap its health benefits.
